MINI MINUTES: PLAINTIFF PAULA FISCAL'S Motion For Writ Of Mandate And/Or Prohibition Or Other Appropriate Relief IS DEEMED SUBMITTED. NO APPEARANCE NECESSARY. (301/JLW/PB) Judge: James L. Warren, Reporter: Christina Paxton, CSR #1558

Notice Of Motion And Motion For Writ Of Mandate And/Or Prohibition Or Other Appropriate Relief
Off Calendar Feb-23-2006 Continued To Mar-20-06 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 301
MINI MINUTES: APPEARANCES:
C.D. Michel, Esq. of Trutanich & Michel, 562-216-4444 & Don Cates for petititoner and moving party Paula Fiscal
Wayne Snodgrass, Esq. and Vince Chhabria, Esq. , Deputy City Attorneys, 415-554-4675 for respondent and opposing party, City and County of San Francisco.
Roderick Thompson, Esq. of Farella, Braun & Martel, 415-954-4400 for Legal Community Against Violence (Amicus Curiae) supporting City and County of San Francisco.

RULING:
A R G U E D and the Court continued PAULA FISCAL's Notice Of Motion For Writ Of Mandate And/Or Prohibition Or Other Appropriate Relief to March 20, 2006. Matter will be deemed submitted at that time. Counsel shall submit by e-mail proposed statements of decision by March 20, 2006. Per diem fees were assessed to the Petitioner per GC 68086 and CRC 892. Judge James L. Warren, Reporter Christina Paxton, CSR #1558. (301/JLW)
